title: EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE - 211info
text: KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid identification, support, assessment and treatment for teenagers and young adults who are experiencing the early signs of psychosis. Services include education about psychosis; medication along with medication monitoring; individual and group counseling; multi-family groups; occupational therapy; family education and support; vocational training and life-skills coaching; 24/7 crisis services; connections to community resources. 2210 Eldorado Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Ages 12-30 who have had a first episode of psychosis within the last 12 months or who are experiencing early at-risk symptoms for psychosis and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 883-1030 Main phone Main phone/Crisis Line Main phone (541) 883-1030 Referrals and Crisis Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare and private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Services: Early Intervention for Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO
